# TaskX

> TaskX is the personal daily workspace for cybersecurity pros — pentesters, architects, SOC analysts, forensic, CISOs. It bundles CVE watch, notes, runbooks, todos, RSS feeds and X (Twitter) timeline in a single fast platform used individually, not as a team SOC tool. TaskX is NOT a SIEM, does NOT ingest IoCs, and does NOT connect to detection backends.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Personal daily workspace for cyber pros — CVE watch, notes, runbooks, todos, feeds and X timeline in one place.
